hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(env|pem|key|credential|secret)$|secrets/|\.ssh/|\.aws/|\.gnupg/"; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Protected file: $FILE\"}" ; else echo "{\"decision\": \"approve\"}" ; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qP "rm\s+-[a-z]*rf[a-z]*\s+/$|rm\s+-[a-z]*rf[a-z]*\s+/\s|rm\s+-[a-z]*rf[a-z]*\s+~$|rm\s+-[a-z]*rf[a-z]*\s+~\s|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+push\s+.*-f\b|DROP\s+TABLE|DROP\s+DATABASE|:\(\)\{\s*:\|:\s*&\s*\};:"; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Dangerous command blocked: $(echo $CMD | head -c 80)\"}" ; else echo "{\"decision\": \"approve\"}" ; fi'
